basic_details.job_title: DTU Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Guest Faculty Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Delhi Technological University (DTU) has officially announced the Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 for the Department of Applied Chemistry. The detailed notification has been released for the engagement of Guest Faculty on a contractual basis. Eligible candidates possessing the prescribed qualifications, including B.Sc., M.Sc., B.Tech./ B.E., M.Tech./ M.E., NET/ JRF, or Ph.D. as per UGC rules, can attend the walk-in interview on 24 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walkin interview details are provided below.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. and M.Sc. in Chemistry or relevant areas with NET/ JRF in Chemistry, M.Sc. in Chemistry with Ph.D. in relevant areas, as per UGC rules, B.Tech./ B.E. in Chemical Engineering or relevant area and M.Tech./ M.E. in Chemical Engineering or relevant area, B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering or relevant area with Ph.D. in relevant area
qualification.details: Guest Faculty - Chemistry: B.Sc. and M.Sc. in Chemistry or relevant areas with NET/JRF in Chemistry, OR M.Sc. in Chemistry with Ph.D. in relevant areas, as per UGC rules. Guest Faculty - Chemical Engineering: B.Tech./B.E. in Chemical Engineering or relevant area and M.Tech./M.E. in Chemical Engineering or relevant area, OR B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering or relevant area with Ph.D. in relevant area.

rows.delhi_technological_university_dtu: B.Sc. and M.Sc. in Chemistry or relevant areas with NET/ JRF in Chemistry, M.Sc. in Chemistry with Ph.D. in relevant areas, as per UGC rules, B.Tech./ B.E. in Chemical Engineering or relevant area and M.Tech./ M.E. in Chemical Engineering or relevant area, B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering or relevant area with Ph.D. in relevant area

content_sections.heading: DTU Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the DTU Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download DTU Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DTU Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Guest Faculty - Chemistry: B.Sc. and M.Sc. in Chemistry or relevant areas with NET/JRF in Chemistry, OR M.Sc. in Chemistry with Ph.D. in relevant areas, as per UGC rules. Guest Faculty - Chemical Engineering: B.Tech./B.E. in Chemical Engineering or relevant area and M.Tech./M.E. in Chemical Engineering or relevant area, OR B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering or relevant area with Ph.D. in relevant area.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for DTU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for DTU Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Guest Faculty positions at Delhi Technological University is scheduled for 24th July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: For Guest Faculty in Chemistry, candidates need B.Sc. and M.Sc. in Chemistry with NET/JRF or Ph.D. For Chemical Engineering, B.Tech./B.E. and M.Tech./M.E. or B.Tech. with Ph.D. is required.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for the DTU Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for these DTU vacancies?
faq.answer: The application mode for these Guest Faculty positions is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q5. What is the job type for the Guest Faculty posts at DTU?
faq.answer: The Guest Faculty positions at Delhi Technological University are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q6. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the DTU office. The exact address and reporting time will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q8. Are there any age relaxations for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Information regarding age limits and relaxations is not explicitly detailed here and should be confirmed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves a Personal Interview. Candidates will be assessed based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply if I have a B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering and a Ph.D. in a relevant area?
faq.answer: Yes, if you have a B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering or a relevant area with a Ph.D. in a relevant area, you are eligible for the Guest Faculty - Chemical Engineering position.
